title: BUILT TO RUN.
NOT TO PITCH.
hero.intro: Metafloor builds products that generate revenue. Not decks. Not demos. Revenue.

cta.title: READY WHEN IT NEEDS TO SHIP.

sections.title: WE DON'T DO THEATER.
sections.body: Most AI studios build something impressive and spend the next six months explaining why it doesn't work yet. We skip that part. We build what works, ship it, and let the results speak.

sections.title: PHILOSOPHY.
sections.body: The best product is one that runs. The best design is the one that gets out of the way. The best strategy is the one that ships and gets measured.

sections.title: DOMAINS.
sections.body: We've worked across prediction systems, voice platforms, industrial tools, and whatever else needed building. Past work stays under NDA — talk to us if you're working in one of these areas.

sections.title: HOW WE WORK.
sections.body: You tell us the problem. We tell you if we can solve it and what it costs. That's it.

sections.title: PRODUCTS.
sections.body: We've also shipped standalone products — ORACLE, OUTBOUND, SHADOW. Each one has its own page.
